top_signals.title: Stocks Climb as Chipmakers Bounce, Oil Fluctuates: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks are getting a lift from a rebound in chipmakers at the start of a week in which Big Tech earnings will help determine whether recent volatility persists or momentum returns. Oil swung between gains to losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.225 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged

top_signals.title: TSMC is accelerating Arizona factory build-out to capitalize on AI 'megatrend,' CFO says
top_signals.summary: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trust between operators, CCAs starts with simulations: Former Air Force secretary
top_signals.summary: Simulations and exercises will be key to boosting trust between operators and CCAs, according to former U.S. Air Force secretary Frank Kendall.
